title: Epic of Gilgamesh, Tablet 6: Ishtar's Proposal
source: Standard Babylonian version; Nineveh library tablets
description: Tablet 6 of the Epic of Gilgamesh: The goddess Ishtar proposes marriage to Gilgamesh; he rejects her. She sends the Bull of Heaven.
introduction: Tablet 6 of the Epic of Gilgamesh: The goddess Ishtar proposes marriage to Gilgamesh; he rejects her. She sends the Bull of Heaven.

translation.text: Gilgamesh said: 'What could I offer you? Your lovers have found you like a brazier that smolders in the cold.'
